# Khayyam Wakil

> Innovative Generalist. CEO of The Artofficial Company. Founder of CacheCow. Constitutional Forcing researcher. 20+ years of World's Firsts across immersive media, frontier tech, and deep tech. Based in Pioneertown, CA (YVR / LAX / LIS).

Khayyam Wakil (@iamkhayyam) finds the structural constraints that force new technology fields into existence — then builds the company around them before anyone else names the category. He has done this three times: Immersive Media (800% revenue growth, 25% global market share, $100M acquisition by Digital Domain), LivePlanet/VideoCoin (co-founded with Halsey Minor, $65M raised, $460M peak market cap), and The Artofficial Company (100+ patents across edge AI, photonics, and ternary computing; $750M US government contract scaling COVID rapid tests from 2M to 200M units/month; 90-foot projected holograms at Super Bowl LIV). CacheCow is the current commercial vertical: coordinated edge intelligence for livestock operations in a market with 90%+ awareness and under 8% adoption. Emmy Award. 3× Cannes Grand Prix. 26× Cannes Lions.

His research programme — Constitutional Forcing — formalizes the instinct: every domain has structural constraints that uniquely determine its governing constants, forced by the algebra, not fitted from data. Nine papers, Lean4-verified, open-source.

- [Home](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/): Overview, featured work, capabilities, experience, speaking, writing, contact
- [Work](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/work/): Capabilities, 30+ selected projects, full work history, advisory, education
- [Awards](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/awards/): Complete award record — Emmy, ×3 Cannes Grand Prix, ×26 Lions, One Show, D&AD, Gunn Report
- [Speaking](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/speaking/): 34 talks (2010–2022) — SXSW, Consensus, IBC, NAB, CES, KOCCA, Slush Play, Paramount Studios
- [Writing](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/writing/): 2 books, 5+ essays, press features in WSJ, Fortune, TechCrunch, NBC, Slate
- [Play](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/play/): Side projects and experiments
- [Learn](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/learn/): Learning resources and knowledge sharing
